description: Look your glamorous best with this lino perros clutch, customised for the glam diva in you. Show off your classy style with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable.Dimensions: 14 cm x 28 cmMade of synthetic velvetFlap with a magnetic button closures and metallic embellishmentOne main zippered compartment with a zippered pocket inside  Detachable chain strap for ease of carryingCareWipe surface with a damp clean cloth
